ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polygenic_scores" (
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polygenic score */,
  "pgs_name" TEXT /* Name of the polygenic score */,
  "pgp_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the PGS publication */,
  "trait_reported_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reported trait */,
  "trait_mapped" TEXT /* Mapped trait(s) using standard ontologies */,
  "num_variants" INTEGER /* Number of variants included in the polygenic score */,
  "ancestry_distribution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ancestry distribution */,
  "scoring_file" TEXT /* FTP link to the scoring file */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the polygenic score was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the polygenic score was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the polygenic score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygenic_scores_ancestry_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("ancestry_distribution_id") REFERENCES ancestries ("ancestry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygenic_scores_trait_reported_id FOREIGN KEY ("trait_reported_id") REFERENCES traits ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polygenic_scores_pgp_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgp_id") REFERENCES pgs_publications ("pgp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgs_publications" (
  "pgp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PGS publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pgp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "trait_ontology" TEXT /* Ontology term for the trait */,
  "trait_category" TEXT /* Category of the trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ancestries" (
  "ancestry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ancestry distribution */,
  "ancestry_name" TEXT /* Name of the ancestry distribution */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ancestry distribution */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population from which the ancestry distribution was derived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ancestry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the institution */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygenic score being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the polygenic score */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the polygenic score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the polygenic score was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pgs_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgs_id") REFERENCES polygenic_scores ("pgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgs_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygenic score */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pgs_versions_pgs_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgs_id") REFERENCES polygenic_scores ("pgs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgs_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygenic score being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the polygenic score */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pgs_reviews_pgs_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgs_id") REFERENCES polygenic_scores ("pgs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pgs_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgs_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygenic score */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pgs_tags_pgs_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgs_id") REFERENCES polygenic_scores ("pgs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pgs_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "pgs_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polygenic score */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the polygenic score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pgs_categories_pgs_id FOREIGN KEY ("pgs_id") REFERENCES polygenic_scores ("pgs_id")
)
